title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, FitOn in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FitOn:
FitOn is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
